title: Forensic Science Regulator annual report for 2023 to 2024
body: "This is the second annual report from the Statutory Forensic Science Regulator Mr Gary Pugh OBE.  The report covers the period between 25 July 2023 to 24 July 2024.  The report includes the following:    preparing for the statutory regulation of forensic science   compliance with the code   development of version two of the code   "
